source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
artist: Unknown photographer (LoC Miscellaneous Items in High Demand)
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: View of Kodiak, Alaska
description: Circa 1900 photograph of Kodiak village showing wooden houses along a dirt lane with a solitary figure walking between them, fishing boats anchored in the harbor beyond, and steep coastal mountains rising from the shore. Kodiak was the original capital of Russian Alaska before the seat of government moved to New Archangel (Sitka) in 1804.
alt: Circa-1900 black-and-white photograph of Kodiak village houses, dirt lane, and fishing boats in the harbor with mountains behind
